service_identification:
| Service | Release and Deploy services for Argenta | | Unique ID | PRD.0.L.191 | | Service Model | Application Management Service (AMS). This service is independent of other layers. |
Service Release and Deploy services for Argenta Unique ID PRD.0.L.191 Service Model Application Management Service (AMS). This service is independent of other layers.
release and deploy services:
This service provides Argenta with the necessary assistance to support them in their release & deploy activities.
Whereas Argenta is responsible for the creation of the deploy scripts and testing them in the DVL environment, Cegeka is responsible for the execution of these tested scripts in the ACC, SIM, VAL & PRD environment.
All deployment is documented in tickets and are tracked within the Argenta ITSM tool, as such the Cegeka deploy engineers will need access to the tooling to be able to perform their jobs. In case database deployments are needed, the Cegeka deploy engineers will log a standard change on the Cegeka portal which will be routed towards the Cegeka database engineers.
The quality of the scripts and the outcome of the correct execution of these scripts is Argenta’s sole responsibility. In case of errors the Cegeka engineers will assist to the best of their knowledge (best effort).
Release activities will be coordinated by the Argenta Release Managers.
service_features:
This section describes the features that can be optionally added to the standard Service features and that will be priced (when applicable) on top of the standard Service features.
The following optional features are possible with the Service:
requests:
Both the Customer and Cegeka can issue a Request for Change (RFC) or a Request for Information (RFI). There are multiple types of requests: The handling of Requests is subject to the regular change management process (see Cross-functionals). | request type | Description | Lead time | | Service Requests | (No service requests for this Service) | | | | | | | Normal Changes | Any other request. | Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request. |
request type Description Lead time Service Requests (No service requests for this Service) Normal Changes Any other request. Indicated case-by-case during the analysis of the request.
out_of_scope: Everything that is not explicitly mentioned in this service description is by default out of scope of this Service.
obligatory: The following services are mandatory for the delivery of this service:
cegeka owned licenses and/or subscriptio:
The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are included in this Service. It is Cegeka’s responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. Licenses and/or subscriptions used for Cross-Functional Services are included in the Service and are not listed below. | License | description/remarks | | (no Cegeka owned licenses) | - | | | |
License description/remarks (no Cegeka owned licenses) -
customer_licenses:
The licenses and/or subscriptions listed in this section and their cost are not included in this Service. It is the customers responsibility to maintain license and/or subscription compliance. | License | description/remarks | | (no Customer owned licenses) | - | | | |
License description/remarks (no Customer owned licenses) -
delivery_location: This Service is delivered on Customer premise and remotely from the Cegeka (virtual) Office environment.
reporting:
The Cross-functional reporting is part of this Service Reporting where it is applicable for this service (see section ‘Relation to Cross-Functional Services’).
There are no specific (recurrent) reports for this Service.
Note: the reporting of the number of tasks executed by Cegeka is delivered by Argenta and is essential for the monthly invoicing. This has been agreed with Argenta, rather than having a Cegeka created report for the amount of tasks.
data_classification:
Cegeka requires no access to confidential and/or personal data to perform this Service.
Engineer credentials do not need to access such data for the purpose of this Service.
In case of assistance in investigations of functional issues, Cegeka personnel may see or receive fragments of such data in case it is shared by the Customer (data fragments in the sense of exports, screen sharing, screen shots, etc. for investigation purposes).
subcontractors:
This service is delivered with:
Subcontractor (Cegeka manages the Service with own engineers which are supported by an external party for escalations or technology specific questions or issues):
(none)
Sub-outsourcer (Cegeka delegates the Service to an external party):
(none)

adherence to cross-functional services:
The Service described in this Service Description does not adhere to the Cross-functional Services as described in the contract.
Note: this service description performs the specific applicative release and deploy which is not the same as the technology release and deploy stipulated in the Cross-functional services.
service_window: The Service Window is the time frame during which the agreed support services from Cegeka are available. Service windows are defined in the related Service Level Management document to this contract.
billing_change:
Changes are billed on a monthly basis.
Changes as result of Pre-approved and Normal Service requests are billed according to the defined prices in the pricing document of the related contact.
Non-standard change requests are billed on T&M basis.
